title: badula grammisticta
intro: Badula grammisticta, also known as the Grammisticta badula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Badula grammisticta include its potential to treat various ailments, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture by herbalists.
